summary: Tested BLOCK 333 (Weekly Report date range & weekAdds) and BLOCK 224 (Daily Prompt Archive drawer). All features working correctly. Backend endpoint /api/prompts/archive returns correct schema (id, text, scheduled_date, response_count, user_responded). Frontend drawer opens, displays prompts, and links to /hive?prompt_id={id}.
critical_code_review_comments: WeeklyReportPage.js line 55: Date range subtitle correctly positioned in IntroSlide with data-testid='report-date-range'
WeeklyReportPage.js lines 107-109: Stats slide shows weekAdds in second column with 'Added' label
WeeklyReportPage.js lines 226-240: FreshStartSlide fallback renders correctly for users with 0 spins
DailyPrompt.js lines 93-99: Archive link 'See what the Hive said yesterday' with data-testid='prompt-archive-link'
DailyPrompt.js line 219: PromptArchiveDrawer component imported and used correctly
PromptArchiveDrawer.js lines 33-89: Sheet slide-over drawer with proper structure (title, description, list/empty state)
PromptArchiveDrawer.js lines 56-84: Each prompt item links to /hive?prompt_id={id} with response counts and user_responded checkmark
daily_prompts.py lines 286-311: GET /prompts/archive endpoint returns last 14 prompts before today with correct schema
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 333 tested: Weekly Report at /reports/weekly shows date range subtitle (e.g. 'March 4 – March 11, 2026') via data-testid='report-date-range', Stats slide shows 'Added' count (weekAdds) in second column, FreshStartSlide displays for users with 0 spins. BLOCK 224 tested: Backend GET /api/prompts/archive returns array with fields id, text, scheduled_date, response_count, user_responded. Frontend archive link visible on Daily Prompt card ('See what the Hive said yesterday'), opens Sheet drawer from right side showing 11 past prompts with dates and response counts, each item links to /hive?prompt_id={id}. testuser has 0 records so Weekly Report shows Fresh Start fallback.

BLOCK_333_weekly_report_date_range.details: IntroSlide shows date range 'March 4 – March 11, 2026' with data-testid='report-date-range'. Format: '{start month/day} – {end month/day}, {year}'

BLOCK_333_weekly_report_weekAdds.details: Stats slide (data-testid='slide-stats') shows 3 columns: Spins, Added, Value. 'Added' is weekAdds count displayed in second column.

BLOCK_333_fresh_start_fallback.details: FreshStartSlide (data-testid='slide-fresh-start') renders for users with 0 spins showing 'A Fresh Start in the Hive' message instead of empty/broken UI.

BLOCK_224_archive_endpoint.details: GET /api/prompts/archive returns last 14 prompts before today. Response includes: id, text, scheduled_date, response_count, user_responded (boolean).

BLOCK_224_archive_link.details: Link 'See what the Hive said yesterday' visible on Daily Prompt card with data-testid='prompt-archive-link'.

BLOCK_224_archive_drawer.details: Clicking archive link opens Sheet slide-over drawer from right side with data-testid='prompt-archive-drawer'. Shows title 'Prompt Archive' and description.

BLOCK_224_archive_list.details: Drawer shows prompt list (data-testid='prompt-archive-list') with 11 items. Each item shows: prompt text in quotes, formatted date (Yesterday/X days ago), response count with message icon, checkmark if user responded.

BLOCK_224_deep_linking.details: Each prompt item is a Link to /hive?prompt_id={id}, enabling deep-linking to see responses for that specific prompt.

mocked_api_note: Streaming links (Spotify/Apple Music) are MOCKED with search URL placeholders. Resend email is MOCKED for most platform emails.
